responsibilities: Design and optimize facility layouts and workflow processes to maximize production efficiency and reduce material handling
Conduct time and motion studies to establish labor standards and identify opportunities for productivity improvement
Develop discrete event simulation models to evaluate process changes and capacity expansion scenarios before implementation
Lead Lean Six Sigma projects to eliminate waste, reduce cycle times, and improve overall equipment effectiveness
Analyze production capacity and demand forecasts to develop staffing plans and resource allocation strategies
Collaborate with operations and finance teams to perform cost-benefit analyses for proposed process improvements
Create value stream maps to identify bottlenecks and design future-state processes that improve throughput
Implement ergonomic workstation designs to improve worker safety and reduce repetitive strain injuries
